name: Sophos Firewall
description: Sophos Firewall API for managing firewall rules, IP hosts, network objects, and security configuration via XML-based API controller

auth_config.note: Credentials passed as query parameters (username and password) with XML request body

actions.name: Get Firewall Rules
actions.description: Retrieve all firewall rules configured on the Sophos Firewall

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter criteria to narrow results (e.g., =, !=, like)

actions.name: Create Firewall Rule
actions.description: Create a new firewall rule with source, destination, and action

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: XML body defining rule name, policy type, source zone/network, destination zone/network, services, and action (accept/drop/reject)

actions.name: Get IP Hosts
actions.description: Retrieve all IP host objects configured on the firewall

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter criteria for IP host objects

actions.name: Create IP Host
actions.description: Create a new IP host object for use in firewall rules (block IP)

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: XML body defining IP host name, type (IP, Network, IPRange), IP address, and subnet

actions.name: Delete IP Host
actions.description: Delete an IP host object from the firewall

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the IP host object to remove

actions.name: Get IP Host Groups
actions.description: Retrieve all IP host group objects

actions.name: Get Zones
actions.description: Retrieve all security zones configured on the firewall

actions.name: Get Firewall Logs
actions.description: Retrieve firewall traffic and event logs
